## Summary

Briefly describe **what** this PR changes and **why** (problem, goal, or ticket link).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Implementation notes (optional)

Call out anything reviewers should know: design decisions, trade-offs, follow-up work, or areas that need extra scrutiny.

- [ ] Builds locally
- [ ] Tested manually (describe steps below)
- [ ] Automated tests added or updated (if applicable)

## Screenshots / recordings (optional)

For UI or visual changes, attach before/after if helpful.

## Breaking changes & migration

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes — describe impact and any migration steps

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No stray debug code, `TODO`s without context, or commented-out blocks left unintentionally
- [ ] Documentation or comments updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Public APIs, assets, or serialized data named and versioned appropriately
